description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a postgres:14.8 service and sets POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD to trust. Add a before_script that runs python3 --version, creates a virtual environment with python3 -m venv venv, activates it, and installs requirements from requirements/ci.txt using the custom index https://pypi.kbsoftware.co.uk/kb/dev/+simple/. Define a test job in the test stage that exports DATABASE_HOST=postgres, DATABASE_PASS=, DATABASE_PORT=, DATABASE_USER=postgres, DOMAIN=dev, HOST_NAME=\"http://localhost:8000\", LOG_FOLDER=, LOG_SUFFIX=dev, MAIL_TEMPLATE_TYPE=\"django\", SECRET_KEY=\"sk_test\" and then runs pytest --create-db --cov-report term --cov=block.
